name: @zoea/places-scraper
description: Google Places → listings scraper CLI (shared DB schema with backend)

scripts.scrape:places:dining: SCRAPE_ROOT_SLUG=dining LEAF_GOAL_LISTINGS=15 LEAF_FILL_MAX_ROUNDS=40 TEXT_SEARCH_MAX_PAGES=5 npx ts-node src/scrape-google-places.ts
scripts.scrape:places:musanze:dining: TARGET_CITY_NAME=Musanze TARGET_CITY_ALIASES=Ruhengeri SCRAPE_ROOT_SLUG=dining LEAF_GOAL_LISTINGS=15 LEAF_FILL_MAX_ROUNDS=50 TEXT_SEARCH_MAX_PAGES=6 npx ts-node src/scrape-google-places.ts
scripts.scrape:places:musanze:all: TARGET_CITY_NAME=Musanze TARGET_CITY_ALIASES=Ruhengeri LEAF_GOAL_LISTINGS=12 LEAF_FILL_MAX_ROUNDS=80 TEXT_SEARCH_MAX_PAGES=6 LEGACY_SCRAPE=1 npx ts-node src/scrape-google-places.ts
